dual_verification_method.arxiv_path: normalize answer_arxiv_id; check membership in paper_database/id2paper.json keys
dual_verification_method.title_path: normalize answer title with [^a-z0-9]+ removal; check membership in cs_paper_2nd.zip namelist
dual_verification_method.full791_policy: unresolvable official gold are represented by unreachable synthetic ids and count as misses for every system

protocol.shared_candidate_pool: keyword/BM25/dense_v2/sub_bm25/sub_dense_v2 top-k union; all systems constrained to the same per-query pool

dual_gold_policy.arxiv_path: normalize answer_arxiv_id; check membership in paper_database/id2paper.json keys

dual_gold_policy.full791_policy: unresolvable official gold are represented by unreachable synthetic ids and count as misses for every system
